title: VampireReborn
body:
# VampireReborn ```Stable``` ```1.21.1``` ```Neoforge only``` - Based on [Neon](https://modrinth.com/modpack/neon-modpack) with some changes to work on neoforge. ## About Modpack that based on vampire thematic. In addition to the main play route, there is a technological and research path. ## Main modpack features Our modpack has a mechanics of classes. There are main and additional, the main class can be one and it is determined by the player, and additional ones depend on the style of play. #### Four main classes - Vampire - Vampire Hunter - Werewolf - Human #### Many additional classes - Mechanic - Warrior/knight - Archer/musketeer - Hunter - Builder - Cook/Brewer - Archaeologist - Alchemist/Sorcerer #### Vampires ![Vampire](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/377b7b46ff89e0ce0b587d8639bbe4a3ac4f85b4.webp) #### Hunters ![Vampire hunter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4efb3d820438b2456418bda22163f9577c3c2cb.webp) #### Werewolves ![Werewolf](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/839bf2203504f260b33605703b7292aede32dd54.webp) *This description is still under development.* ## Open wiki You can edit our modpack wiki! [Do it!](https://codeberg.org/WasteLandOrigin/VampireReborn/wiki) Development criteria: [View in wiki](https://codeberg.org/WasteLandOrigin/VampireReborn/wiki/Development-criteria-english) ### Can we go through the entire modpack? The modpack has no logical conclusion, but if you want to test yourself, there are several objectives: - Work in progress ## Community We are an open community, always ready to help. We have our own discord server with a forum, a github page where you can leave noticed bugs or your suggestions. ## Steam deck and controllers compatibility - Use [Controlify](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlify) - Controlify comes with a huge range of settings to fine-tune each of your controllers individually, including vibration strength, every single controller input bind (no hardcoding!) and more. ## Performance We recommend allocate minimum 6GB of ram for singleplayer game and 4GB for playing on server. And quad core cpu is strongly recommended. ## Community servers (Soon) Do you want to add your server to the official list of servers? Send us a message on the discord for this! But there are some rules: 1. No donation, which can affect the gameplay. 2. There is no territory private system. 3. Mods and configs on the server are identical to mods and configs on the client. ## Mod loader ```This modpack works only on neoforge!``` [Go to the official neoforge website](https://neoforged.net/) ## Social

## Other ``` Tip: install our icon to install in the launcher (launcher_logo.png) Tip: use Aikar´s launch options, they will help you to be more efficient :) Tip: use the latest version of neoforge Tip: this modpack will be work better if you using Linux. But MacOS/Windows still compatible Also: We prefer the Foss mods. Info: We use original logo of vampirism mod for creating logo for this modpack ```
